card.name: Norra, The Portal Conjurer
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Whenever Norra deals combat damage to an opponent, create a Mysterious Portal token. Whenever another creature you control enters, put a Portal counter on Norra. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Norra has six or more Portal counters, remove all Portal counters from Norra, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Norra, The Long-Lost Yordle

card.name: Norra, The Long-Lost Yordle
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Whenever Norra deals combat damage to an opponent, create a Mysterious Portal token. Mysterious Portal tokens you control have "When this token is sacrificed, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with mana value 7 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle each other revealed card into your library." --- (Front): Norra, The Portal Conjurer

card.name: Sharesies
card.text: Create a token copy of target equipment or enchantment attached to a creature you control except it has "Sacrifice this permanent at the beginning of your end phase", then attach the token copy to a creature you control.

card.name: Mysterious Portal LORT-WW
card.text: When this token is sacrificed, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with mana value 3 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle each other revealed card into your library. (If you would draw a card while you control this token, flip a coin. If you lose the flip, draw the card. If you win the flip, draw the card, then sacrifice this token.)

card.name: Chime LORT-WW
card.text: When this token is sacrificed, put a +1/+1 counter on a random creature you control. (If you would draw a card while you control one or more Chime tokens, flip a coin. If you lose the flip, draw the card. If you win the flip, draw the card, then sacrifice all Chime tokens you control.)

card.name: Magical Journey
card.text: Target player creates a Mysterious Portal token and a Chime token.

card.name: Living Library
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) When Living Library enters, if you sacrificed a Mysterious Portal or Chime token, or an opponent sacrificed a Puffcap or Flashbomb token this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Portalpalooza
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Create two Mysterious Portal tokens. Draw a card.

card.name: The Tea Maker
card.text: When The Tea Maker enters, create a Mysterious Portal token.

card.name: Origami Slicer

card.name: Junk Construct
card.text: When Junk Construct is destroyed, create a Mysterious Portal token.

card.text: Choose one — • Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. • Destroy target equipment. Draw a card.

card.name: Realm's Caretaker

This ability costs {1} less to activate for each End counter on World Ender.

card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Randomly choose a landmark card in your graveyard, then put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Glory's Call
card.text: Glory's Call costs {2} less to cast for each legendary creature you control. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal nine blue black cards, choose X+1 cards from among them where X is equal to the number of legendary creatures you control, add them to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Sands of Time
card.text: Creatures opponents control get -2/-0 until end of turn, then choose one — • Remove four time counters from target landmark you control. • Search your library for a landmark, reveal it, then put it onto the battlefield under your control, then shuffle.

card.name: Rockbear Shepherd
card.text: When Rockbear Shepherd enters, create a Hibernating Rockbear token. Whenever another creature you control enters, remove a time counter from the landmark with the most time counters among landmarks you control.

card.name: Priestess Of Desert Light
card.text: At the beginning or your upkeep, Priestess Of Desert Light gets -0/-4. Then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a legendary creature, exile it, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. You may cast cards exiled this way from exile for as long as they remain exiled. Whenever creatures exiled this way enters, put two +1/+1 counters on that creature.

card.name: Castigate
card.text: Destroy all creatures. They can't be regenerated.

card.name: Fireth, Reaper of the Sands
card.text: This creature can't block. Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) When Fireth enters, reveal reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two equipment cards, choose one and put it onto the battlefield, then attach it to Fireth, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Keeper of the Box
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) The first time an equipment you control is attached to a creature you control, Keeper of the Box gets lifelink.

card.name: Gwen
card.text: First strike, Hallowed (Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.) Whenever Gwen attacks, the defending opponent loses 2 life, and you gain 2 life. Then you may have target other creature with hallow you control attack target opponent. Activate Gwens and that creatures hallowed ability as they attacked alone. Whenever Gwen deals combat damage, put that many Snip counters on Gwen. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Gwen has ten or more Snip counters, remove all Snip counters from Gwen, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Gwen, The Hallowed Seamstress

card.name: Gwen, The Hallowed Seamstress
card.text: First strike, Hallowed (Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.) Whenever Gwen attacks, the defending opponent loses X life, and you gain X life where X is half of Gwens power rounded down. Then you may have target other creature with hallow you control attack target opponent. Activate Gwens and that creatures hallowed ability as they attacked alone. --- (Front): Gwen

card.name: Eternal Dancers
card.text: Hallowed (Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.) Whenever Eternal Dancers attack, choose a creature in your graveyard with equal or less power than Eternal Dancers. Put that creature onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. Creatures that enter this way, enters with "At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice this creature."

card.name: Opulent Foyer
card.text: When Opulent Foyer enters, create a Ghastly Band token. At the beginning of your upkeep, create a Ghastly Band token.

card.name: Ghastly Band LORT-WW
card.text: Ephemeral, Hallowed (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it. Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.)

card.name: Strike Up The Band
card.text: Create two Ghastly Band tokens.

card.name: Boisterous Host
card.text: Hallowed (Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.)

card.name: Vora
card.text: When Vora enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a husk creature, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Sultur
card.text: When Sultur enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a husk creature, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Hate Spike
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature you control. Hate Spike deals 3 damage to target creature. Then if you control a creature named Evelynn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a husk creature, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Ghostly Paramour
card.text: Lifelink, Hallowed (Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.)

card.name: Conductor Of The Mists
card.text: Hallowed (Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.) When Conductor Of The Mists dies, create a Ghastly Band token.

card.name: Thread the Needle
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature you control. Thread the Needle deals damage equal to that creatures power to any target.

card.name: Phantom Butler
card.text: Fearsome, Hallowed (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each creature with Hallowed in your graveyard.)

card.name: Malefic Spear
Formal Invitation
card.text: Choose up to two creature cards in your graveyard that died this turn. Exile each creature card chosen this way. You may cast the cards exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Blades of the Fallen
card.text: Target creature you control gets "When this creature dies, create an Icathian Mirage token."

card.name: Quietus
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target equipment. • Destroy target creature with total power and toughness 4 or less.

card.name: Haunted Tomb
card.text: Vanishing 2 (This permanent enters with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.) When Haunted Tomb is sacrificed with no time counters, put the creature with the highest power among creatures in your graveyard onto the battlefield.

card.name: Wraith of Echoes
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control for each creature you control that died this turn.

card.name: Utter Devastation
card.text: Destroy all creatures, except demon creatures you control and creatures with an attached equipment you control.

card.name: Shadow Isles Tellstones
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and Ephemeral. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) • Destroy target creature you control, if that creature would enter the graveyard, exile it instead, then return it to the battlefield under its owners control. • Destroy target creature an opponent controls. • Destroy target landmark an opponent controls.

card.name: Redeemed Prodigy
card.text: Whenever Redeemed Prodigy attacks, create a tapped and attacking Ghastly Band token.

card.name: Shape of Fear
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature you control. Create an Encroaching Mist token.

card.name: Harrowing Return
card.text: Put the creature with the highest power from among creatures in your graveyard onto the battlefield. It gets ephemeral and fearsome. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it. Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Creatures opponents control get -1/-0 until the end of turn.

card.name: Moonlit Glenkeeper
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever another creature you control enters, it gets ephemeral and a +1/+0 counter. (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) Nightfall: create a Sapling token. (If this creature is not the first spell you have cast this turn, when Moonlit Glenkeeper enters, create a Sapling token)

card.name: Isles Deathless Knight
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever Isles Deathless Knight would be given ephemeral, it gets a +1/+1 counter instead. (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Undergrowth
card.text: Toss 3, then Undergrowth deals 2 damage to target creature. You gain 2 life. (Exile three cards from the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Soul Cleave
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nontoken creature you control. Create two token copies of the sacrificed creature. Tokens created this way enters with ephemeral. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Ceaseless Sentry
card.text: When Ceaseless Sentry dies, draw a card.
